metadata.description: Native-first, low-friction companion plugins for Claude Code.

plugins.name: task-queue
plugins.description: Turns Claude Code's native task list into a live work queue: a review loop on every prompt, cross-session resume, one-command ship (verify → PR → squash-merge), and an enforced autopilot that parks the important decisions as a reviewable pile while deciding the routine rest. Full details on the plugin page.

plugins.name: tidy
plugins.description: Clean-as-you-touch: formats and lint-checks the file you just edited, surfaces its blast radius, and holds a Stop-hook verification floor (tests, the project's own quality gates, a regression gate on debt-magnet files, and prune nudges) — the safety net a non-technical owner can't produce. Full details on the plugin page.

plugins.name: charter
plugins.description: Know the project: a SessionStart brief flagging missing Claude-facing docs and git-derived "scar tissue" (repeatedly-fixed files), a Stop-time gate that checks finished work against recorded decisions, and /charter:align on demand. Full details on the plugin page.

plugins.name: hud
plugins.description: One read-only status line for the companion plugins — health, feature state, tests, parked-questions, token throughput, and git branch — in three glanceable zones. Zero model-token cost. Full details on the plugin page.
